abilities.name: Flight

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Fly forward quickly and then free-fly briefly.
raw.ability details: * Reveals enemy health bars without having dealt damage to them. * Being [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[mobility lock]]ed prevent the ability from being activated and make Echo temporarily unable to fly, but do not completely end the ability. Only being [[hacked]] completely interrupts the ability. * Can be manually cancelled by pressing the ability key (default: LSHIFT) again. * Holding jump causes Echo to rise, while holding crouch causes her to descend. * When used, grants a speed burst of 28 m/s, which is sharply reduced to 8 m/s over ~0.5 seconds. * Vertical and horizontal speed are related. You can't have 8 meters per second of horizontal and vertical speed in same time. ** If the vertical speed is <0.25, then the horizontal maximum can be no more than 8 and vice versa. ** If your crosshair is exactly centered and you pinch forward/back and jump/crouch then your vertical and horizontal speed will be 5.66 meters per second. ** If your crosshair is exactly centered and you pinch forward/back and jump/crouch and right/left then your vertical speed = 4 and horizontal = 6.93. * The ability's maximum horizontal speed is 0.25 meters per second slower than the speed from the passive ability. * Movement acceleration in air increased by 100% when changing directions.

abilities.name: Focusing Beam

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam
raw.official description: Channel a beam for a few seconds. Deals very high damage to targets under half health.
raw.damage:
75 per second
175 per second (target <50% hp)
raw.ability details: * Deals 3.5 times more damage if she is targeting an enemy whose [[HP]] is 50% of their maximum or lower. ** Also triggers against [[objects]]. ** [[Overhealth]] on the target counts as current HP but not as maximum HP. As such, gaining overhealth can put the hero above the threshold if their base HP was just below, preventing the damage bonus from applying. * Can be manually cancelled by pressing the ability key again. * Focusing Beam is a [[channeled]] ability; Echo cannot fire or use other abilities while it's active, and it is interrupted if Echo is [[stunned]], [[knocked down]] or [[hacked]]. ** [[File:FLIGHT.png|sub|link=Echo#Flight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Flight|Flight]] and [[File:GLIDE.png|sub|link=Echo#Glide|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Echo#Glide|Glide]] can be used without interrupting Focusing Beam and vice versa. ** ''Could not find 'Duplicate' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' can be activated, but it will interrupt Focusing Beam. ** If the ability is interrupted before the end of the casting time, the cooldown will not start.

abilities.name: Sticky Bombs
shot_type: [[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Fire a volley of sticky bombs that detonate after a delay.
raw.ability details: * Deals up to 180 single target damage if all bombs are stuck. * The projectile can be destroyed while in air by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], but a stuck bomb and the explosion are unaffected. * [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] affects all damage dealt, if the projectile passes through it. Splash damage alone going through is not amplified.

abilities.name: Duplicate

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability target ui.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Targeted ability|Targeted ]] Targeted
raw.official description: Become a copy of the targeted hero. They cannot swap heroes for the duration.
raw.ability details: * Cannot target another Echo (even if that Echo is duplicating another hero) or non-playable characters, like [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]] or [[Training Bots]]. * If Echo targets a D.Va pilot, Echo will still duplicate the mech. * Echo's HP instantly becomes the full base HP of her target, however this caps at 350 combined health. * Echo's target cannot switch heroes for the duration of the ability. * Echo gains access to her target's hero-specific [[Ping|Pings]] for the duration, such as those for a [[Sleep Dart|slept enemy]] or deployables such as [[File:Ability-symmetra4.png|sub|link=Symmetra#Teleporter|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Symmetra#Teleporter|Teleporter]]. Most of these will not trigger a voice line. ** Echo cannot use these pings after Duplicate ends, even if the debuff or deployable is still active. * Duplicate does not gain any of the target's Perks. * Echo is [[phased out]] while transforming (cast recovery and reverting), becoming immune to damage and most negative [[status effect]]s. ** Sierra's [[File:Tracking Shot.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tracking Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tracking Shot|Tracking Shot]] will not be removed when transforming, and will continue to lock onto Echo after she finishes. * While Duplicate is active, Echo generates 5.5x ultimate charge from all sources. ** The patch notes are poorly worded with regard to the charge generated. Echo's ultimate generation is increased by an additional 450%, not multiplied by 4.5 times, for a total of 550%. * When the duration ends, or if Echo's HP is reduced to 0, Echo reverts back to normal. Her HP returns back to what it was before, or 50% of her max HP if it was lower than that. ** If Echo falls off the map while Duplicated, she will be instantly eliminated. * Reverting back to Echo interrupts whatever ability she was using. Most deployed abilities, buffs, and debuffs disappear after 3 seconds. ** Projectiles, turrets and damage or healing over time effects usually continue dealing damage or healing during this time, and in some cases will generate ultimate charge for Echo. ** [[Overhealth]] from Wrecking Ball's [[File:Adaptive_shield.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Shield|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Shield|Adaptive Shield]] and Lifeweaver's [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]] persists even after 3 seconds have passed since Duplicate ended, and is instead removed as the ability normally would. ** Some projectiles, turrets, or damage over time effects fail to attribute their damage or kill credit to Echo after Duplicate has finished. This is also reflected on the kill feed, as while the ability and eliminated player will generally be correctly displayed, no player will be shown as responsible for the elimination. *** Affected abilities include: Junker Queen's [[File:Rampage_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Rampage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Rampage|Rampage]], Hazard's [[File:Jagged_Wall.png|sub|link=Hazard#Jagged Wall|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hazard#Jagged Wall|Jagged Wall]], Mauga's [[File:Incendiary_Chaingun_icon.png|middle|link=Mauga#Incendiary Chaingun|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Incendiary Chaingun|Incendiary Chaingun]], Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma1.png|middle|link=Sigma#Hyperspheres|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Hyperspheres|Hyperspheres]] and [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|sub|link=Sigma#Accretion|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Accretion|Accretion]], Sierra's [[File:Helix Rifle.png|sub|link=Sierra#Helix Rifle|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Helix Rifle|Helix Rifle]] and [[File:Tremor Charge.png|sub|link=Sierra#Tremor Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sierra#Tremor Charge|Tremor Charge]], Sojourn's [[File:Disruptor_Shot_Icon.png|sub|link=Sojourn#Disruptor Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sojourn#Disruptor Shot|Disruptor Shot]], Soldier: 76's [[File:icon-ability.helixrockets.png|sub|link=Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Soldier: 76#Helix Rockets|Helix Rockets]], Ana's [[File:Ability-ana1.png|middle|link=Ana#Biotic Rifle|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Biotic Rifle|Biotic Rifle]], and Moira's [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] and [[File:Ability Moira Coalescence.png|sub|link=Moira#Coalescence|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Coalescence|Coalescence]], among others. **** [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] eliminations will instead be displayed as being caused by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], except on Practice Range bots. ** Mauga's [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]], Sigma's [[File:Abilities-sigma2.png|sub|link=Sigma#Experimental Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Experimental Barrier|Experimental Barrier]], Cassidy's [[File:Magnetic_Grenade.png|sub|link=Cassidy#Flashbang|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Cassidy#Flashbang|Flashbang]] hinder, Ana's [[File:Ability-ana4.png|sub|link=Ana#Nano Boost|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ana#Nano Boost|Nano Boost]], Brigitte's [[File:Rally.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Rally|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Rally|Rally]] overhealth, Lifeweaver's [[File:Life_Grip_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Life Grip|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Life Grip|Life Grip]], Lúcio's [[File:Ability-Lucio4.png|sub|link=Lúcio#Sound Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lúcio#Sound Barrier|Sound Barrier]], and Mizuki's [[File:Ability Binding Chain.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Binding Chain|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Binding Chain|Binding Chain]] end immediately. Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat2.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Concussion Mine|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Concussion Mine|Concussion Mine]] and [[File:Ability-Junkrat5.png|sub|link=Junkrat#RIP-Tire|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#RIP-Tire|RIP-Tire]] detonate immediately. Projectiles deflected with Genji's [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] disappear immediately. ** Ramattra's [[File:Ravenous_Vortex_Icon.png|sub|link=Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|Ravenous Vortex]], Freja's [[File:Bola Shot.png|sub|link=Freja#Bola Shot|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Freja#Bola Shot|Bola Shot]], and Hanzo's [[Dragonstrike]] remain present but cease dealing damage. If [[File:Ravenous_Vortex_Icon.png|sub|link=Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ramattra#Ravenous Vortex|Ravenous Vortex]] is in flight, it will not detonate or create its damaging zone upon landing. Kiriko's [[File:Kitsune_Rush_Icon.png|sub|link=Kiriko#Kitsune Rush|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Kiriko#Kitsune Rush|Kitsune Rush]] remains present but ceases buffing players. ** Baptiste's [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] and Mizuki's [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] remain present and functional, but will play their outro sound effects at the time they would have disappeared normally, even if they disappear early due to Duplicate ending. ** Anran's [[File:Passive Ignition.png|sub|link=Anran#Ignition|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Anran#Ignition|Ignition]] and Torbjörn's [[File:Ability-torbjorn5.png|sub|link=Torbjörn#Molten Core|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Torbjörn#Molten Core|Molten Core]] continue burning enemies, but do not deal any damage. ** Moira's [[File:Ability Moira Biotic Orb.png|sub|link=Moira#Biotic Orb|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Moira#Biotic Orb|Biotic Orb]] ceases moving. ** Junkrat's [[File:Ability-Junkrat4.png|sub|link=Junkrat#Total Mayhem|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junkrat#Total Mayhem|Total Mayhem]] will trigger if Duplicate ends due to HP being reduced to 0, but not if it ends due to maximum duration or falling off the map. * Echo can still use her own equipped voicelines and sprays while transformed, but not her or her target's emotes. * Echo will use the user's key bindings, options and crosshair for the targeted hero while transformed. * Echo copies the target's currently equipped skin. * In [[Overwatch Uprising]], Echo can target a [[Null Sector]] [[OR14]] or a [[Bastion Siege Automaton B73]], duplicating a standard [[Orisa]] or [[Bastion]] respectively.
